sourcesContent:
"use client"; import { useState } from "react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { ShoppingCart, Heart, User, Search, Menu, Utensils, Smartphone, Sofa, ShowerHead, Shirt, Tv, Cookie, X, } from "lucide-react"; import { Swiper, SwiperSlide } from "swiper/react"; import { Autoplay, Pagination } from "swiper/modules"; import "swiper/css"; import "swiper/css/pagination"; import Footer from "./footer"; export default function HomePage() { const [dropdownOpen, setDropdownOpen] = useState(false); const [cartOpen, setCartOpen] = useState(false); const navigate = useNavigate(); const categories = [ { name: "Snack", icon: }, { name: "Food & Drinks", icon: }, { name: "Smartphones", icon: }, { name: "Furniture", icon: }, { name: "Shower", icon: }, { name: "Clothing", icon: }, { name: "Electronics", icon: }, ]; const bestSellers = [ { id: 1, name: "หมูสามชั้นสไลด์", price: "฿199", image: "/images/products/pork1.png", category: "Meat" }, { id: 2, name: "นมถั่วเหลือง Lactasoy", price: "฿20", image: "/images/products/lactasoy.png", category: "Beverages" }, { id: 3, name: "สบู่ Protex", price: "฿45", image: "/images/products/protex.png", category: "Shower" }, ]; return (
{/* ----------------- Home Content ----------------- */}
{/* Navbar */}
setCartOpen(true)} />
{dropdownOpen && (

navigate("/signin")} > 👤 login

navigate("/signup")} > 👥 register

navigate("/signin-admin")} > 🛠 login admin

)}
{/* Example content */}

Best Sellers

{bestSellers.map((p) => (

{p.name}

{p.category}

{p.price}

))}
{/* ----------------- Cart Panel ----------------- */} {cartOpen && (
{/* Background overlay */}
setCartOpen(false)} /> {/* Panel */}

Shop cart

{/* สินค้าในตะกร้า */}

Be Nice Shower Cream

$109.00

Protex Soap Bar

$57.00

KFC BamBam Box

$159.00

{/* ปุ่มจ่ายเงิน */}
)}
); }
